title: Vasundhara
desc: Mallika demands that her son, Dhruva, follow in her footsteps and lead a disciplined and successful life. However, he decides to court Vasundhara after she captivates his attention with her beauty.

title: Merupu Kalalu
desc: Samyuktha, a young woman, tries to balance her life and her responsibilities as a responsible daughter. Meanwhile, her father helps people with his work and tries to be a good father to his children.

title: Yashoda
desc: A young woman navigates severe hardships after a deceitful relationship results in pregnancy, prompting a compassionate man to fight against society for her hand and offer unwavering support.

desc: When Lord Shiva beheads Lord Ganesha, unaware of the fact that he is his son, Goddess Parvati asks Shiva to resurrect him. Later, Lord Ganesha is then renamed Vighnaharta, the remover of obstacles.
